description_long: This object is a vintage-style sewing machine with a robust, rectangular body finished in teal and mounted on a black base. The machine features a prominent arm extending over a circular black bowl-like area, which serves as the workspace for fabric manipulation. Gold accents are visible on the side, including a circular vent or speaker and a rectangular panel with a small screen or indicator. The needle mechanism is suspended above the bowl, supported by a metallic shaft. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external controls and a smooth, glossy surface. The machine appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with some electronic components integrated into the side panel.
description: A teal and black vintage sewing machine with gold accents, a bowl-shaped workspace, and a streamlined, glossy body. Features include a side control panel and a suspended needle mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal body and black base, with minimal visible features.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the arm, bowl-shaped workspace, and the needle mechanism above the bowl.
description_view_2: Front view focusing on the bowl workspace and the needle mechanism directly above it.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the gold-accented control panel and circular vent, as well as the overall machine profile.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A rectangular control panel on the right side with one button and a small screen or indicator, arranged vertically.
